title: Session 23 — Goodbyes
bodyText:
**TL;DR: Goodbyes — the dwarven march ended in words not blades, daylight returned to Koviz as Kennarea honored the deal, and a dying G sent the party down the heaviest stream toward the pool.**

# What happened
- **[[pc-felson|Felson]] and [[cumb]] broke into [[filbert]]'s house** — a gold hoard and walls of motivational posters.
- **[[ms-judy]] sent a warning via self-destructing owl.**
- The Stonemason dwarves **marched on town** led by [[gilly]] and Ghruom — resolved with words, not blades; the party **deflected the patricide accusations** in a meeting with the dwarven leaders.
- **The deal held: daylight returned to [[koviz]] — [[kennarea|Kennarea]] honoring her side now that [[root-darkpass|Root]] is gone.** Hope came back: warm breezes, light, life.
- **[[giuseppe|G]] — sick and bedridden — gave his final advice for finding [[the-pool|the pool]]: "Follow the water down. Follow the heaviest stream."**
- The party said their goodbyes and set out down the underground river toward the source of everything.

> [!dm] Party on the descent: **[[pc-eddy|Eddy]] (Pal 6), Felson (Monk 6), [[pc-varen|Varen]] (Wiz 6), Cumb (Rogue 4)**. [[pc-brolin|Brolin]], [[eira-cavernborn|Eira]], and [[michael-myconid]] are NOT on the S24 roster — where did they stay, and why? Record it.

# Fired / left smoking
- [x] The patricide accusations — deflected; the dwarven march resolved with words.
- [x] Daylight returned to Koviz — Kennarea honoring her side of the deal.
- [ ] Judy's warning (self-destructing owl) — what comes of it?
- [ ] Where did Brolin, Eira, and Michael stay, and why? Record it.

# Threads
[[the-pool]] · [[koviz]] · [[kennarea]] · [[giuseppe]] · [[ms-judy]]
